problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Combining Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
